title: cheirostylis tortilacinia
intro: Cheirostylis tortilacinia is a species of flowering plant in the family Diapensiaceae, commonly known as the "twisted ginseng" due to its unique twisted rhizome. It is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and its extracts have been shown to exhibit antibacterial and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, Cheirostylis tortilacinia is often combined with other medicinal plants and used as a decoction or infusion to harness its medicinal properties.
